doctrine: spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-20-ccp-oob-provisioning-import.md §5.2 — one finding-partition table, three implementations (Go generator ClassifyFinding, api TS re-check, app TS advisory partition), one fixture. Every case is checkout-independent (pure finding fields only, mirroring eligibility-cases.json's own doctrine for verdicts): the checkout-based creation_security_types re-derivation (§5.3 screens 1/3) and the 'address resolves in checkout' refinement are NOT covered here — only catalogctl's Go generator/drift-edit layer those on top, since only they have a checkout to inspect. A case added here must fail every implementation that disagrees. A finding has no Terraform address (§3.1) — that is its defining property — so this fixture, unlike eligibility-cases.json, has no address field at all.

cases.name: creation-security-flagged-ungenerable
cases.reason: tfType "aws_iam_role" is flagged securityFamily — creation-security types are never portal-importable; investigate per runbook D2/D5 (the actor evidence is the head start), then either delete-in-AWS (human + owner sign-off) or a manual engineer-tier kit-lane import PR

cases.name: creation-security-wins-over-missing-payload

finding.payloadWithheldReason: type is creation-security — never a candidate (§2.6 step 1)

cases.reason: tfType "aws_security_group" is flagged securityFamily — creation-security types are never portal-importable; investigate per runbook D2/D5 (the actor evidence is the head start), then either delete-in-AWS (human + owner sign-off) or a manual engineer-tier kit-lane import PR

cases.name: type-unmapped-empty-tftype
cases.reason: tfType is absent — this resource type is outside the services.json 43-type map; extend services.json (a data change + fixture) or use the manual kit import lane

cases.name: type-unmapped-wins-over-security-family
cases.reason: tfType is absent — this resource type is outside the services.json 43-type map; extend services.json (a data change + fixture) or use the manual kit import lane

cases.name: payload-withheld-with-mechanical-reason

finding.payloadWithheldReason: generated config carries secret-shaped values — import via the kit runbook with secret handling (e.g. ignore_changes on the secret attribute), never through the portal

cases.reason: generated config carries secret-shaped values — import via the kit runbook with secret handling (e.g. ignore_changes on the secret attribute), never through the portal

cases.name: payload-withheld-no-reason-falls-back
cases.reason: no import payload was generated for this finding — payload generation may not be armed for this sweep, this finding fell outside the 20-candidate cap, or it was excluded upstream; see the sweep run's payload step

cases.name: payload-withheld-incomplete-payload-object
cases.reason: no import payload was generated for this finding — payload generation may not be armed for this sweep, this finding fell outside the 20-candidate cap, or it was excluded upstream; see the sweep run's payload step

cases.name: unknown-class-always-ungenerable
cases.reason: finding class "some_future_finding_class" is not "unmanaged_resource" — fail-closed, needs-human (the finding partition only recognizes the constant unmanaged_resource class id)

cases.name: hostile-class-proto
cases.reason: finding class "__proto__" is not "unmanaged_resource" — fail-closed, needs-human (the finding partition only recognizes the constant unmanaged_resource class id)
